calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-10-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Froilan N. Gaabucayan, appears in Pro Per; Respondent, Charita B. Repollo, appears in Pro Per. Parties had previously signed the stip & order to allow a Judge Pro Tem to hear the case.
Parties, previously sworn, present their respective cases in the narrative. Appearing with Ms. Repollo, sworn as a witness, is Sami I. Sandy.
EXHR(1) Copy of handwritten Prommissory note signed by Mr. Caabucayan
EXHA(A) Copy of a series of checks
9:35am
Matter is submitted. Evidence is retained by the Court.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Continued To Feb-05-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Judge Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525:
9:10am
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Froilan N. Gaabucayan, appears in Pro Per; Respondent, Charita B. Repollo, is not present. Representing her is Sama I. Sandy, who informs the Court Ms. Repollo is ill and requests a continuance on her behalf. Judge Myles finding good cause grants the request. The matter will be continued to Feb-05-09, 9:00am. Court to send notice.
9:20am
Matter is submitted.
